scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send: SIP/2.0 100 Trying [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number]pid1001 [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Supported: timer,100rel Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Length: 0

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Allow: INVITE,ACK,OPTIONS,BYE,CANCEL,INFO,REFER,NOTIFY,PRACK,UPDATE Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length:[len]
v=0 o=- 1395694499 2 IN IP4 192.168.138.207 s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [local_ip] b=AS:2048 t=0 0 m=audio 3254 RTP/SAVP 0 101 a=sendrecv a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=ptime:20 a=crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:Q7PP5R9V1QnjttI3qWToiooIab7iquPJSCgYLJ1z UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP m=video 3256 RTP/SAVP 97 99 96 b=TIAS:2048000 a=sendrecv a=rtpmap:97 H264/90000 a=fmtp:97 profile-level-id=42801f;max-br=10240;max-mbps=490000;max-fs=8160 a=rtpmap:99 H264/90000 a=fmtp:99 profile-level-id=64001f;max-br=10240;packetization-mode=1;max-mbps=490000;max-fs=8160 a=rtpmap:96 H263-1998/90000 a=fmtp:96 CIF4=1;CIF=1;QCIF=1;SQCIF=1;CUSTOM=1024,768,4;CUSTOM=800,600,3;CUSTOM=704,480,1;CUSTOM=640,480,2 a=content:main a=label:11 a=crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:E+Am4sVFOJtOG1EhUvqFOoQQQu3OJJey7t/aBgt3 UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP a=rtcp-fb:* nack pli a=rtcp-fb:* ccm fir m=application 3260 RTP/SAVP 100 a=sendrecv a=rtpmap:100 H224/4800 a=crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:eR5XnwEd5Tm4M1QJVKYD2uCI6iJ1uEcNajXsRDv4 UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP m=application 3235 TCP/BFCP * c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [local_ip] a=sendrecv a=connection:new a=setup:active a=floorctrl:c-only a=floorid:2 mstrm:12
